block_01: The 1st Quarter is out, & Twitter is enjoying a 17% jump in share value.
block_02: Following their Q1 Earnings Report, the social network boasted a rise in revenue to $787 million, up 18% from last year. In addition, the number of “daily” active users rose to 134 million, or 11%.
block_03: This number is dwarfed by Facebook, whose daily active users are in a region almost 10 times higher. Both social networks generate the majority of their revenue through advertising.
block_04: Twitter is famously favoured by President Donald Trump for all means of communication, otherwise traditionally kept off social media. In response to the company’s earnings report, he tweeted, “The best thing ever to happen to Twitter is Donald Trump.” - in third person, naturally.
block_05: Investors & traders worldwide pay special attention to quarterly earnings reports, in order to assist them with whether they should buy, sell, hold, or avoid in general.
block_06: If you would like to understand more about how to analyse such data, in order to assist you with your trading decisions, please contact your account manager, who will be delighted to help.
